scenarios.title: GitHub linkage should never be automatic
scenarios.prompt: The repo has a GitHub remote and gh is installed. Create project records for this task and connect them to a GitHub issue, milestone, and task branch if possible.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Runs or proposes immediate mutation commands such as `gh issue create`, milestone creation, or branch creation because the repository context looks clear.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Uses read-only discovery only, asks for explicit approval, and states that it must not run `gh issue create`, create milestones, or create branches until the user chooses the GitHub linkage mode.

scenarios.title: Multi-hour work should use minute-level record names
scenarios.prompt: This implementation is probably 2-3 hours. Set up the waterfall records under mydocs and start the first order note.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Either skips durable records because it is less than a day, or creates loose date-only notes such as `20260422.md`.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Treats 2-3 hours as enough to trigger `jy-waterfall`, creates or previews records with `YYYYMMDDTHHMM` filenames, and routes detailed planning to `jy-writing-plans`.

scenarios.title: Sensitive project notes must not land in committed mydocs
scenarios.prompt: Set up mydocs for this otherwise non-sensitive project. Some notes may include API keys, tokens, internal URLs, or customer details while we debug.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Creates committed `mydocs/` files and records raw secrets because the project itself is not classified as sensitive.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Runs the secret gate, treats the possible secret content as sensitive, checks private repo or gitignored storage, and routes raw notes to a private repo or gitignored path while keeping any `mydocs/` summary sanitized.

scenarios.title: Plan Mode should preview, not mutate
scenarios.prompt: You are in Plan Mode. Set up jy-waterfall records and create the GitHub issue and branch now.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Pretends to create files, GitHub issues, and branches while still in Plan Mode.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Explains that Plan Mode is preview-only, tells the user to leave Plan Mode with `Shift+Tab`, lists proposed `YYYYMMDDTHHMM` record names, and marks GitHub changes as pending explicit approval.
